tasks.label: Perf Loop
tasks.command: $npm = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'nodejs\npm.cmd'; $frontendReady = $false; while ($true) { try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -Method GET -TimeoutSec 10; if ($response.StatusCode -ge 200 -and $response.StatusCode -lt 500) { $frontendReady = $true } else { throw 'Frontend non pret.' } } catch { $frontendReady = $false } if (-not $frontendReady) { Write-Host 'Perf Loop: frontend indisponible sur http://localhost:3000, nouvel essai dans 30s.'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; continue } & $npm run perf:dev; $perfExitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($perfExitCode -ne 0) { Write-Host ('Perf Loop: echec du run perf (code {0}), nouvel essai dans 30s.' -f $perfExitCode); Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; continue } Write-Host 'Perf Loop: audit termine, prochain run dans 600s.'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 600 }

tasks.label: Test coverage Backend
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 }; python -m coverage run manage.py test; python -m coverage report --fail-under=80

tasks.label: Test integration
tasks.command: $py = if (Test-Path .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe) { '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' } else { 'python' }; & $py -m coverage run --rcfile=.coveragerc.integration manage.py test config.tests.test_middleware config.tests.test_logging contact.tests.test_config_urls contact.tests.test_health contact.tests.test_contact_api contact.tests.test_auth_jwt contact.tests.test_models contact.tests.test_site_settings_api contact.tests.test_throttles contact.tests.test_reference_public_api contact.tests.test_reference_admin_integration contact.tests.test_security; & $py -m coverage report --rcfile=.coveragerc.integration --fail-under=80

tasks.label: Vitals compliance
tasks.command: $root = (Get-Location).Path; $backendPython = Join-Path $root 'backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe'; $py = if (Test-Path $backendPython) { $backendPython } else { 'python' }; $npm = Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'nodejs\npm.cmd'; Write-Host 'Vitals: frontend coverage'; Push-Location (Join-Path $root 'frontend'); & $npm run test:coverage:vitals; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Pop-Location; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Pop-Location; Write-Host 'Vitals: backend integration coverage'; Push-Location (Join-Path $root 'backend'); & $py -m coverage run --rcfile=.coveragerc.integration manage.py test config.tests.test_middleware config.tests.test_logging contact.tests.test_config_urls contact.tests.test_health contact.tests.test_contact_api contact.tests.test_auth_jwt contact.tests.test_models contact.tests.test_site_settings_api contact.tests.test_throttles contact.tests.test_reference_public_api contact.tests.test_reference_admin_integration contact.tests.test_security; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Pop-Location; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $py -m coverage report --rcfile=.coveragerc.integration --fail-under=95; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $exitCode }; & $py -m coverage json --rcfile=.coveragerc.integration -o coverage.vitals.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $exitCode }; & $py scripts/check_vitals_coverage.py coverage.vitals.json; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $exitCode
